tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[tab]            [ch]A[/ch]
I'll take a chainsaw to the sofa[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
Where I held your body close for so long, so long[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]
 Walk in the house, lights are off[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                            [ch]D[/ch]
 In the closet by the door, there's your coat[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]A[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]
I wasn't thinking of you before[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]Em[/ch]
Too many rooms in this house, so I keep going out[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]D[/ch]
What the hell is that about?[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                               [ch]D[/ch]
 We gotta find a way to be okay[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                           [ch]A[/ch] 
And maybe I'll just take a chainsaw to the sofa[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch] 
Where I held your body close for so long, so long[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]                  
I'm gonna break the fucking china[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
Cause it's just one more reminder you're gone, you're gone[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
 When I get home, TV on[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                        [ch]D[/ch]
 Drink in my glass, better make it strong[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]A[/ch]                     
Some nights wanna fill this space[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
 A tight dress and a pretty face[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]Em[/ch]  
  Keep finding things that you left on purpose[/tab]
[tab]                                         [ch]D[/ch]
Did you plan that your timing's perfect?[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
Gotta find a way to be okay[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                       [ch]A[/ch]      
Maybe I'll just take a chainsaw to the sofa[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch] 
Where I held your body close for so long, so long[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]                  
I'm gonna break the fucking china[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
Cause it's just one more reminder you're gone, you're gone[/tab]

[Post-Chorus]
[tab]                 [ch]A[/ch]
We were building brick by brick[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
Now it's just a quicksand home, yeah[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]A[/ch]        
So I'll take a chainsaw to the sofa[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch] 
Where I held your body close for so long, so long[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
 I could put a sign in the lawn[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                 [ch]G[/ch]
 But it'd mean that I would wanna let you go[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]G[/ch]
And I don't wanna let you go[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
 I could put a sign in the lawn[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                 [ch]G[/ch]
 But it'd mean that I would wanna let you go[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]G[/ch]
And I don't wanna let you go[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]            [ch]A[/ch]
I'll take a chainsaw to the sofa[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
Where I held your body close for so long, so long[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]
I'll burn everything that binds us[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
Take a lighter to the mattress and run[/tab]

[Post-Chorus]
[tab]                 [ch]A[/ch]
We were building brick by brick[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
Now it's just a quicksand home, yeah[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]A[/ch]        
So I'll take a chainsaw to the sofa[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch] 
Where I held your body close for so long, so long[/tab]

Yeah, so long
